class.name: NeighbourhoodServer
class.brief_description: Singleton server for spatial neighbourhood queries on [Node2D] objects.
class.description: NeighbourhoodServer is an autoloaded singleton that allows [Node2D] objects to subscribe with associated data. It provides efficient spatial queries to retrieve the nearest neighbour or all neighbours within a given distance.

method.name: get_all
method.description: Returns all subscribed neighbours near [param position]. If [param max_distance] is greater than [code]0.0[/code], only neighbours within that distance are included.

method.name: get_next
method.description: Returns the nearest subscribed neighbour to [param position]. If [param max_distance] is greater than [code]0.0[/code], only considers neighbours within that distance. Returns [code]null[/code] if none are found.

method.name: subscribe
method.description: Subscribes [param node] to the NeighbourhoodServer with the given [param data]. The node can then be found by spatial queries.

method.name: unsubscribe
method.description: Removes [param node] from the NeighbourhoodServer so it is no longer returned by spatial queries.

members.member: The size of each grid cell used for spatial partitioning.
The time interval (in seconds) between grid refreshes.
